name: OntoMetric (ontology-guided ESG metric KG + two-phase validation)

paper.title: OntoMetric: An Ontology-Driven LLM-Assisted Framework for Automated ESG Metric Knowledge Graph Generation

difficulty.rationale: structure-aware segmentation -> ontology-constrained extraction with deterministic ids -> two-phase validation (semantic type verification + rule-based schema check) with provenance; deterministic mock, no GPU/finetuning
